titleStmt.title: SII 20.65: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 65. (B.K. No. 73 of 1936-37.) MALGHAṆ, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 25, Māgha, śu. 3, Friday, the name of the year being lost. If the cyclic year is Vikrama as in No. 64, the details of the date would correspond to A.D. 1101, January 4.
This slightly worn out record seems to register a gift of garden and land to god Traipurushadēva made over to Divākara-bhaṭṭōpādhyāya by Vāmadē[vayya] at the time of the construction of a well.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti yamaniya
ma svā dhyā ya dhyā nadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpannaru sakala jagatprathita
kalōtpannaru pratidinakriyamāṇapaṁcamahāyajña pavitrīkri
dādhyayanaprāvīṇyaprasāditaśrōtriyanikāyaru Uttīrṇna samastasmriti
haracaraṇasarōjamadhukararu nāmādisamastapraśasti sahitaṁ
tyarāthēyaṁ divākarabhaṭṭōpādhyāyargge svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 25 ne
samvatsarada māgha su 3 sukravāradaṁdu bhāviyu dyāpanaṁ māḍi śrī vāmadē
rgge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi traipuruṣadēvaraṁ nōḍi pūjeya puḻpakkeṁdu Ūriṁ mūḍa po
paḍuvalu biṭṭa tōṁṭaṁ māṇikēśvarada mattaroṁdu A keygaṁ manege baṇaṁbegaṁ tōṁṭakkaṁ
pra Ī dharmmamaṁ Ūruṁ maAbout 24 letters here seem to have been erased.
hājanaṁgaḷuṁ prabhugaḷuṁ kādūḍuvaru . Ī dharmmamanāvanōrvvanaḷidoḍaṁ vāraṇāsiya
luṁ kurukṣētradaluṁ kavileyuṁ brāhmeṇarumaṁ koṁda dōṣavakku Ī dharmmamanārōrbbaru
pratipālisidavarige vāraṇāsiyalu sāsirakavileyaṁ Uttamarappa brāhmaṇarige dā
naṁgoṭṭa puṇyavakku . svaṁdātuṁ sumahacchakyaṁ duḥkhamanyasya pālanaṁ dānaṁ vā pālanaṁ
vēti dānacchrēyōnupālanaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭi
rvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 20.65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
